info.name: Train Booking API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Train Booking backend.

Suggested run order:
1. Health Check
2. User Register or User Login
3. Admin Login
4. Admin bootstrap requests: cities, stations, train, train stops, coach, fare rule, schedule
5. User search, seat allocation, booking, and cancellation requests
6. Admin and user follow-up read/update/delete requests

Important notes:
- Admin requests use {{admin_token}}
- User requests use {{user_token}}
- The collection saves important IDs into collection variables automatically
- Use `Show Schedule Details And Current Allocations` before booking to inspect seat availability for a route segment
- Use `Create Booking And Allocate Tickets` to generate booking, PNR, and ticket allocation records
- Use PATCH `/bookings/:id/cancel_ticket` to cancel one allocated ticket
- Use PATCH `/bookings/:id` to cancel the entire booking and refund all active allocations

item.name: Show Schedule Details And Current Allocations

request.description: Returns schedule details for the selected source and destination segment. Check the `allocations` array here before booking to understand which seats are already occupied on this leg.

exec: if (data.booking && data.booking.ticket_allocations && data.booking.ticket_allocations.length > 0 && data.booking.ticket_allocations[0].pnr) pm.collectionVariables.set('ticket_pnr', data.booking.ticket_allocations[0].pnr);

request.description: Creates a booking and allocates one ticket per passenger. The number of `seat_ids` must match the number of passengers. The response stores `booking_id`, first `ticket_allocation_id`, and first `ticket_pnr` into collection variables.

Cancels only one allocated ticket inside an existing booking. This marks the selected ticket allocation as cancelled, creates a cancellation record, and usually leaves the booking in `partially_cancelled` state when other tickets are still active.
Cancels every active ticket allocation under the booking, creates cancellation entries for each ticket, and returns the total refund amount for the full booking cancellation.
